radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the subscription plan radio buttons section. Contains the list of selectable subscription package options and their visual/behavioral settings.

indicator_alignment.description: Alignment of the radio indicator icon within the button. Supported values: 'right' for right-aligned, 'none' to hide the indicator, or any other value (including null) for left-aligned (default).

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

buttons.description: List of individual radio button items representing subscription package options. Each button links to a subscription button configuration via its id.

badge.description: Badge configuration displayed on the radio button, typically used for promotional labels like discounts or 'Best Value'. Supports different styling for selected and deselected states.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

color.description: Text color value for the badge label.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color value for the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color value for the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state.

variant.description: Visual variant/style identifier for the badge appearance.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: Whether to hide the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. When true, the badge is only visible when selected.

text.description: Display text for the badge label on the radio button. Can contain dynamic price placeholders delimited by '%%' that are replaced with actual package pricing.

selected_bg_color.description: Background color value for the radio button when it is in the selected state.

disabled_text_color.description: Text color value for the radio button when it is in the deselected/disabled state.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

selected_border_color.description: Border color value for the radio button when it is in the selected state.

is_selected.description: Whether this radio button is selected by default when the screen loads.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: Whether this radio button should be rendered as an enlarged/bigger button component compared to the standard size.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the subscription button component from the 'subscription_button' remote settings. Links this radio button to its package and CTA configuration.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color value for the radio button when it is in the deselected/disabled state.

border_color.description: Border color value for the radio button when it is in the deselected/disabled state.

gradient_type.description: Gradient type identifier applied to the radio button's badge visual style.

purchase_on_select.description: Whether selecting (double-tapping) a radio button immediately triggers the purchase flow for the associated subscription package.

type.description: The visual style type for the radio buttons layout. Supported values: 'tiers_style' for tiers layout, or any other value (including null) for the default layout style.

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Configuration for the trial reminder toggle component. Uses the same remote settings key and component structure as the switch package toggle but serves as a separate trial reminder control.

is_enabled.description: Whether the trial reminder toggle is enabled. Defaults to false when not specified.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the trial reminder toggle component from the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Configuration for placeholder text displayed in relation to the toggle component. Uses the title component mapper for rendering.

is_enabled.description: Whether the toggle placeholder text is enabled. When false, the text is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the toggle placeholder text component from the 'offer_toggle_placeholder_text' remote settings.

content_id.description: Unique screen name identifier used to match this screen configuration to a requested touchpoint. Falls back to 'default' if no match is found.

footer.description: Configuration for the footer component on the subscription offer screen. Defined in the data model but not actively used in the current screen rendering logic.

is_enabled.description: Whether the footer component is enabled. When false, the component is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the footer component from remote settings.

banner.description: Configuration for the main banner component on the subscription offer screen. Displays images/media and supports click actions via deep links.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner component is enabled. When false, the banner is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the banner component from the 'offer_screen_banners' remote settings.

description.description: Configuration for the description component on the subscription offer screen. Defined in the data model but not actively used in the current screen rendering logic.

is_enabled.description: Whether the description component is enabled. When false, the component is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the description component from remote settings.

title.description: Configuration for the main title text displayed on the subscription offer screen. Rendered with T6 typography and semi-bold font weight.

is_enabled.description: Whether the title component is enabled. When false, the title is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the title component from the 'offer_screen_titles' remote settings.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

close_button.description: Configuration for the close button on the subscription offer screen. Supports custom icon URL, alignment (LEFT or RIGHT), and margin configuration.

is_enabled.description: Whether the close button is enabled. When false, a default close button is shown instead.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the close button component from the 'subscription_screen_close_button' remote settings.

subtitle.description: Configuration for the subtitle text displayed below the title on the subscription offer screen. Rendered with T5 typography and medium font weight.

is_enabled.description: Whether the subtitle component is enabled. When false, the subtitle is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the subtitle component from the 'offer_screen_subtitles' remote settings.

banner_placeholder.description: Configuration for the banner placeholder component that displays promotional text and an optional badge image above the main banner area. Supports shadow effects.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner placeholder component is enabled. When false, the component is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the banner placeholder component from the 'offer_banner_placeholder_text' remote settings.

secondary_button.description: Configuration for the secondary action button displayed as underlined text. Can open a deep link action or a subscription tiers half-screen fragment.

is_enabled.description: Whether the secondary button is enabled. When false, the button is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the secondary button component from the 'offer_screen_secondary_button' remote settings.

logo.description: Configuration for the logo component on the subscription offer screen. Defined in the data model but not actively used in the current screen rendering logic.

is_enabled.description: Whether the logo component is enabled. When false, the logo is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the logo component from remote settings.

switch_package_toggle.description: Configuration for the package switch toggle that allows users to switch between subscription packages (e.g., toggling free trial on/off). Controls enabled/disabled state views with different package IDs, titles, and styling.

is_enabled.description: Whether the switch package toggle is enabled. When false, the toggle is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler stability flag. Internal framework field, not used by application logic.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the toggle component from the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings.
